name: kizano-story-packager
description: Packages and compiles the server and web versions for deployment.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:web
scripts.clean: (cd server && npm run clean) && (cd web && npm run clean)

author: Markizano Draconus <markizano@markizano.net>
